list.vod_blurb: A young criminal defense attorney struggles with a homicide case that is not as cut and dry as it ap
list.vod_content: A young criminal defense attorney struggles with a homicide case that is not as cut and dry as it appears while battling a drinking habit. The story goes beyond the م€€م€€lives of those directly related to the case and shines a much needed spotlight on the horrific world of human trafficking in the United States.
